title: hieracium levicaule subsp. wainioi
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. wainioi, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Hieracium levicaule subsp. wainioi can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
